# userText

**Instance Property**

A text string that a person provides in response to the notification.

## Declaration

```swift
var userText: String?
```

## Discussion

This property contains text for notifications that support the [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/Action/ActionType/textInput(placeholder:)] action type.
title: userText
